title: Gay-Themed Mediterranean Cruise Turned Away From Turkey and Then Egypt
summary_full: In both Muslim-majority countries, official hostility to gay people has increased in recent years. But the same cruise had visited before without problems.
summary_public: In both Muslim-majority countries, official hostility to gay people has increased in recent years. But the same cruise had visited before without problems.

TR.label: negative
TR.evidence: official hostility to gay people has increased in recent years
